channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Gulf Nations Urge Diplomacy Amid Escalating US-Iran Tensions
item.description: Gulf nations have called for an urgent return to diplomacy as the United States and Iran continue a widening exchange of attacks, raising concerns that the confrontation could spiral into a broader re...

item.title: Jennifer Lopez Shares Insights on What Makes a Man Attractive
item.description: Jennifer Lopez, the 56-year-old singer and actress, shared her perspective on what makes a man attractive during her performance at the Dolce & Gabbana show in Taormina, Sicily. She emphasized that ma...

item.title: Bauchi Governor Proposes Integration of Arabic Education into National Curriculum
item.description: Bauchi State Governor, Bala Mohammed, has proposed integrating Arabic education more formally into Nigeria's national curriculum, sparking debates over educational equity and religious implications. T...

item.title: Blue Bombers edge Redblacks 36-34 in thrilling overtime finish
item.description: In a closely contested CFL matchup, the Winnipeg Blue Bombers secured a dramatic 36-34 overtime victory over the winless Ottawa Redblacks. Quarterback Dru Brown led the comeback for Winnipeg, culminat...

item.title: Nairobi Mum Shares Heartbreaking Story of Daughter's Tragic Fall from 22nd Floor
item.description: A Kasarani family is in shock after 21-year-old Margaret Wambui died under mysterious circumstances following a fall from the 22nd floor of Alura Apartments in Nairobi's Upper Hill. Margaret, a hotel ...

item.title: Obanikoro Focuses On Mentoring Next Gen After Dropping Governorship Bid
item.description: Former Minister of State for Defence, Musiliu Obanikoro, has officially ruled out his gubernatorial ambitions for Lagos State, stating his focus is now on mentoring young Nigerians. In an interview wi...

item.title: UK Election 2024: Key Issues and Candidates Highlighted
item.description: The 2024 UK general election marks a pivotal moment in British politics, with voters set to decide the future of the nation's governance. Key issues dominating the campaign include healthcare reforms,...

item.title: World Cup half-time show features iconic artists and Muppets
item.description: The World Cup half-time show on July 20, 2026, featured a star-studded performance by global icons Madonna, Shakira, and Justin Bieber, alongside the beloved Muppets. This high-energy spectacle, broad...

item.title: FBI Directive on ICE Investigations Sparks National Debate
item.description: The New York Times report revealed a new FBI directive instructing agents to avoid investigating confrontations with ICE officers, sparking nationwide controversy. The directive, which limits law enfo...

item.title: Former DOJ Attorney Accuses GOP Senators of Vitriolic Behavior During Confirmation Hearing
item.description: Liz Oyer, a former pardon attorney under the Trump administration, accused several Republican senators—including Josh Hawley and Eric Schmitt—of engaging in 'vitriolic' and 'dangerous' rhetoric during...

item.title: India's Education Protests: Youth Demand Reform and Accountability
item.description: Hundreds of supporters of India's youth-led Cockroach movement have gathered in New Delhi to march towards Parliament, demanding the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan. The protest, ...

item.title: ASX Flat Amid US-Iran Tensions and Tech Sector Volatility
item.description: Australian shares traded flat on Monday as oil prices surged to over $90 per barrel, driven by escalating US-Iran tensions and a technology-led selloff. The S&P/ASX 200 Index edged up 6.8 points to 88...

item.title: Minister McKenzie Justifies R31 Million FIFA World Cup 2026 Spending
item.description: Sports, Arts and Culture Minister Gayton McKenzie has defended the Department of Sport, Arts and Culture's (DSAC) expenditure of approximately R31 million on South Africa's FIFA World Cup 2026 engagem...

item.title: Nairobi Law Firm Sells 44 Repossessed Vehicles at Prices Ranging from KSh 196k to KSh 2.5 Million
item.description: A Nairobi-based law firm, Onyango & Tarus LLP Advocates, has listed 44 repossessed motor vehicles for sale through a private treaty. The vehicles range from budget hatchbacks to SUVs and commercial tr...

item.title: Kylian Mbappe Wins FIFA World Cup 2026 Golden Boot
item.description: Kylian Mbappe has secured the Golden Boot award at the FIFA World Cup 2026, finishing ahead of Lionel Messi and other top contenders like Harry Kane and Jude Bellingham. The award is given to the play...

item.title: Tanzania's Initiative to Integrate Traditional Medicine into Evidence-Based Healthcare
item.description: The Ministry of Education, Science, and Technology in Tanzania has launched a national strategy to bridge traditional medicine with modern scientific research. This initiative, championed by Minister ...

item.title: Australian candidate challenges Nigel Farage in UK by-election, highlighting cross-border policy influences and Trump's World Cup remarks
item.description: The article explores the political landscape surrounding an Australian candidate, Daniel Pocock, running in a UK by-election against Nigel Farage. Pocock's campaign highlights how UK policies have inc...

item.title: World Karate Federation Supports Interim Leadership Amid Disciplinary Proceedings Against Sonny Pillay's Executive
item.description: The World Karate Federation (WKF) has confirmed that Karate South Africa (KSA) remains a full member of the global body despite the suspension of its national executive led by long-serving president S...

item.title: Guide to Checking and Settling NCAP Traffic Violations via eGovPH App
item.description: The eGovPH Super App now allows motorists in the Philippines to access and monitor traffic violations under the No Contact Apprehension Policy (NCAP), launched by the MMDA and DICT. Users can register...

item.title: Alberta Separatist Lawyer Faces Legal Disputes Over Indigenous Law Cases
item.description: Jeffrey Rath, a prominent Alberta separatist lawyer known for his work with First Nations communities, is facing significant legal challenges. A court has imposed an asset freeze on Rath and his firm,...
